title: FLOSS Weekly 447: Kazoo Update
summary:
KAZOO is 2600Hz’s Flagship Offering and provides voice, data and messaging services to millions of users globally. KAZOO’s unique multi-tenant architecture is distributed and highly scalable, with flexible deployments and dynamic call control managed from one simple, intuitive interface. Darren Schrieber is the CEO and Co-Founder of 2600Hz. Karl Anderson is the CTO and Chief Architect at 2600Hz.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
